name: inngest
description: Official Inngest plugin for Codex: skills and MCP wiring for brownfield audits, durable functions, durable agents, Agent Evals, event-driven workflows, flow control, middleware, realtime updates, v3-to-v4 migrations, CLI/dev-server workflows, API CLI operations, and REST API v2 fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Audit codebases and build durable workflows, agents, and Agent Evals with Inngest.
interface.longDescription: Inngest teaches Codex how to audit an existing TypeScript/JavaScript codebase for durability gaps, add, debug, migrate, and evolve durable functions, event schemas, step-based workflows, durable agent flows, Agent Evals with scoring/sessions/experiments, flow-control policies, middleware, realtime UI updates, CLI/dev-server workflows, API CLI operations, and REST API v2 fallback for Cloud and local environments. It also wires Codex to the local Inngest dev server MCP endpoint when available.
defaultPrompt: Audit this codebase for Inngest opportunities.
Create a durable AI agent workflow.
Add Agent Evals with scoring and sessions.
